text.title: Laravel Rules: N+1, Auth, Queues, and Agent Gotchas
text.summary: Concrete rules for eager loading, policy coverage, queue idempotency, and LLM mistakes to reject in Laravel 11.

rule.statement: Never access a relationship in a loop without eager loading. Use with() in controllers/services and loadMissing() when the model is already hydrated.
rule.rationale: Accessing $user->organization inside a loop without eager loading generates one SQL query per user (N+1), silently degrading performance.

rule.statement: Use $with = [] on models only for universally needed relationships. Prefer explicit with() per query to avoid hidden global eager loads.
rule.rationale: Hidden global eager loads cause unexpected query overhead on endpoints that don't need the relationship.

rule.statement: Use Policies + Gates for authorization. Cover the unauthenticated case (when $user is null) in every policy method.
rule.rationale: Inline $this->authorize() checks duplicate logic. Missing the null-user case allows unauthenticated access to pass policy checks.

rule.statement: For multi-tenant apps, every policy method must verify $user->organization_id === $model->organization_id before allowing access.
rule.rationale: Without tenant scope, a user in org A can read/modify records of org B.

rule.statement: Queue jobs default to tries=3, backoff=[10, 30, 60]. Add ShouldBeUnique to any job that mutates shared state. Add idempotency keys for external API calls.
rule.rationale: Without ShouldBeUnique, concurrent retries run simultaneously and hammer external APIs or double-apply state changes.

rule.statement: Do not use Auth::user() inside a job. Inject the user ID and refetch from the database in the job's handle() method.
rule.rationale: Jobs run outside the HTTP session context. Auth::user() returns null in queue workers.

rule.statement: Reject diffs targeting Laravel 11 that still emit app/Http/Kernel.php middleware registrations. Laravel 11 uses bootstrap/app.php for middleware.
rule.rationale: Kernel.php was removed in Laravel 11. Agents emit it from training on older versions.

rule.statement: Reject Cache::remember() calls without a tenant-scoped cache key in multi-tenant apps.
rule.rationale: A cache key without tenant scope leaks data between organizations when the same key is used by different tenants.

rule.statement: Reject API Resource diffs that call JsonResource::withoutWrapping() without a justification comment.
rule.rationale: Removing the data wrapper silently breaks any frontend that expects the {data: [...]} envelope.

text.reference: CI gate that enforces fillable, FormRequest, and eager-load rules
